locator.quote: With arb_raw defaulting to N(0, σ), arb_frac

text: Continuous action heads initialise near the centre of their range: with arb_raw defaulting to N(0, σ), arb_frac starts around 0.5 (8 ticks, mid-range).

locator.quote: Stronger signal to that head should break

text: Agents mostly stayed near 8 ticks so fill rates cluster despite arb_spread_scale varying 0.5–1.5; stronger signal to that head should break the herd.
